title: Copper Tridents
description: A resource pack that, simply, turns normal tridents into ones made out of copper!
body:
![RP Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/971ab3232d83eec7fdf865ae959632b8e125988b.png)
A resource pack that, simply, turns normal tridents into ones made out of copper!

Tridents can be enchanted to summon lightning. Tridents are carried by drowned who can also drop copper.

Makes sense, right?

You may get an "Incompatible version" error when loading the mod on any version below 1.20.4, but, testing shows that the resourcepack WILL work on any version 1.13 and above!
